official_title: Courts Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division SEPTEMBER 17, 2017 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS of Order No. 6 DIFC Courts (/glossary/DIFC-courts/) Rules (/glossary/rules/) Court (/glossary/court/) of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division I, Michael Hwang, of the DIFC Courts, make the following Chief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Order: In exercise of the powers conferred on me by Article 8(3)(a) of Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004, as amended; and after having reviewed: Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the , as amended;DIFC (/glossary/DIFC/) Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended; DIFC Order No. 1 of 2014 in respect of the Rules of the DIFC Courts: 1.This Order may be cited as Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017 2. By this Order, I issue Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts (“RDC”) – establishing a specialist Technology and Construction Division (“TCD”) 3. In accordance with Rule 56.6 of the RDC, I hereby appoint Justice Sir Richard Field to be the in charge of the TCD.Judge (/glossary/judge/) 4. Part 56 of the RDC will come into force on 1 October 2017 5. This shall fi rst be refl ected in the online version of the RDC, and subsequently in hardcopies published by the DIFC DRA Academy of Law Michael Hwang Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts
